message:
feat(bench): add flat-combining vs lock-based contention benchmark matrix

Implements contention benchmarks for bd-byd9.2: compares flat-combining
publication slots against Mutex and RwLock baselines under varying thread
counts (1/2/4/8/16), operation mixes (read-heavy, write-heavy, balanced),
and batch sizes. Includes JSON result export for CI artifact collection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
